author: bobbin/crew/goldblum
text: Setup timeout bumped to 900s in cli.py for polars maturin develop builds. Run with: just eval-task polars-001. Polars is ~50K LOC Rust + Python, maturin dev build takes ~5min.

author: bobbin/crew/goldblum
text:
## Eval Run Complete — All 5 Ruff Tasks

Run IDs: 20260211-205550-db96, 20260211-211454-ac17, 20260211-211456-1a30, 20260211-213753-3ed4, 20260211-213754-3397

### Results Summary

| Task | no-bobbin F1 | with-bobbin F1 | Duration delta | Cost delta |
|------|-------------|----------------|----------------|------------|
| ruff-001 | 0.75 | 0.33 | -100s (-27%) | -$0.70 |
| ruff-002 | 0.57 | 0.57 | -66s (-21%) | +$0.04 |
| ruff-003 | 1.00 | 0.80 | +3s (+1%) | -$0.38 |
| ruff-004 | 0.75 | 0.75 | -52s (-19%) | -$0.05 |
| ruff-005 | 1.00 | 1.00 | -3s (-2%) | +$0.31 |
| **Avg** | **0.814** | **0.691** | **-44s (-13%)** | **-$0.16** |

All 10 runs passed tests (100% pass rate both approaches).

### Bugs Found and Fixed
1. Global settings contamination (d7ca192): --settings is additive not replacement
2. Path mismatch in overlap calc (d7ca192): absolute vs relative paths
3. Duplicate gate_skip_details extraction (d7ca192)

### Key Finding: Changelog Injection Problem (bo-cwt4v)
31/37 injected files were changelogs or markdown. Real ground truth overlap 1/16 (6.25%). This is the #1 blocker.

### What's Working
- Hook injection fires reliably, gate threshold 0.45 works
- Agents use bobbin CLI when CLAUDE.md guidance present
- With-bobbin is 13% faster and 11% cheaper

### What Needs Improvement
- Filter changelogs/docs from injection results (bo-cwt4v)
- Coupling expansion not surfacing related test files

author: bobbin/crew/goldblum
text:
## Progress (session 2) — ef52c5f

### Done
- Bulk Lance insert: single write per batch instead of per-file (lance insert 50s->0.4s)
- Auto GPU detection: probes CUDA EP at startup, no env var needed (BOBBIN_GPU=0 to force CPU)
- Adaptive batch size: 4x when GPU active (32->128 chunks per flush)

### Ruff benchmark results (GPU, 4950 files, 57533 chunks)
- Total: 4m11s (was >30m timeout on CPU)
- Embed: 24s at 2,390 chunks/s (GPU MiniLM-L6-v2)
- Lance insert: 0.4s (bulk insert fix)
- Lance delete: 50s (new bottleneck - per-batch delete_by_file)
- Git coupling: 162s (biggest bottleneck, not embedding-related)
- Parse: 1s, Compact: 0.2s

### Remaining bottlenecks (future work)
1. Git coupling analysis: 162s - could be parallelized or cached
2. Lance delete: 50s - could skip delete on fresh index (no existing data)
3. Batch size could go even higher (256-512) since GPU handles it fine

author: bobbin/crew/goldblum
text:
## Progress (session 4)

### Done
- Setup timeout bumped to 900s in cli.py for polars maturin builds (474f6de)
- Updated all 13 eval-run beads to Opus/$100/1hr config
- Created ruff-001/002 Opus beads (immediately closed — polecats already ran them)
- Reviewed polecat results: ruff-001 F1=0.33, ruff-002 F1=0.57 (with-bobbin 20-30% faster)

### Current state
- 2 tasks done (ruff-001, ruff-002)
- 2 tasks in-progress (ruff-003/rust, ruff-004/chrome polecats)
- 11 tasks open (ruff-005, 5 flask, 5 polars)

### Notes
- Opus ruff-001 with-bobbin F1=0.33 — same as no-bobbin (Sonnet was 1.00 with bobbin)
- Bobbin's speed advantage is clear: 20-30% faster with bobbin in both ruff tasks
- Flask tasks all FAIL on Sonnet $5, might work on Opus $100
- Polars is untested territory — medium Rust+Python, maturin builds

author: bobbin/crew/goldblum
text:
## Progress (session 6)

### Done
- Pulled latest: polecats landed eval metrics (bo-lb6av, bo-j8ec2, bo-lvd97) + stream-json discovery
- Verified all 4 humble-dazzling-breeze beads (native metrics) already implemented → created and closed bo-kluv3, bo-5on35, bo-k8hu9, bo-dmbzm

- Planned eval tool use trace collection (docs/plans/eval-tool-use-traces.md)

### Next
- Implement bo-wz5x6: parse_stream_json() + run_agent switch to stream-json

author: bobbin/crew/goldblum
text:
Decomposed into 2 sub-beads and slung to polecats:
- bo-elu5i.1 (lance delete skip, ~50s saving) → rust
- bo-elu5i.2 (coupling cache, ~162s saving) → chrome

Both have detailed implementation plans with exact file/line references. Parent stays hooked until children complete.

author: bobbin/polecats/chrome
text: Implemented coupling cache: check HEAD hash + coupling_depth against SQLite metadata before running analyze_coupling(). Cache hit skips ~162s of git log parsing. Force flag bypasses cache. All 436 tests pass.

author: bobbin/polecats/chrome
text: Completed: Removed all tambour references from bobbin. Deleted tambour.just, 5 scripts, 2 tambour docs, .tambour/ directory. Updated justfile, .gitignore, Cargo.toml, AGENTS.md, CONTRIBUTING.md, PRD.md, VISION.md. Historical docs retained. All 253 tests pass.

author: aegis/crew/ian
text: PO acceptance criteria (ian): Gate pass rate >= 50% on eval queries. Precision >= 85%, Recall >= 65%, F1 >= 72%. Priority: gate_threshold sweep first (0.50-0.65), then semantic_weight + doc_demotion. Prereq: fresh eval with current defaults.

author: bobbin/crew/strider
text: Completed: config defaults updated (sw=0.90, dd=0.30, gate=0.50), tests passing, pushed to main (6c3d9dc). Filed follow-ups: bo-tkp2 (ruff cal), bo-d7s3 (flask-001 empty idx), bo-gzkq (GPU/CUDA). Model comparison inconclusive. Next: search-level ablation testing on flask.

author: bobbin/crew/strider
text: Completed: Ran ruff ablation with GPU (auto-detected, no env vars needed). 57k chunks indexed in 60s at 3272 chunks/s. Key finding: semantic search hurts on large Rust monorepos (sw=0.0 F1=0.301 > baseline sw=0.9 F1=0.194). Fixed calibrate.py re-index bug (--force needed after checkout). Wrote adaptive-defaults design doc (docs/plans/adaptive-defaults.md). Filed bo-vw0m for glossary work. Pushed a6a7a79.

author: bobbin/crew/strider
text: Calibration sweeps on three repos (flask, ruff, bobbin) show the default sw=0.90 is suboptimal for 2/3 repos. Flask preferred sw=0.50 (+33% F1), ruff preferred sw=0.00 (+92% F1), only bobbin itself was optimal at sw=0.90. A balanced default of sw=0.50 would be a better starting point before calibration. See docs/plans/calibration-sweep-results.md for full data.

author: bobbin/crew/strider
text:
Implementation shipped (5686e1a, c6fc42e, 7568c89):

- [x] BridgeMode enum (off/inject/boost/boost_inject) added to ContextConfig
- [x] Commit→source signals extracted from commit chunk 'Files changed:' section  
- [x] Score boosting implemented: multiplies seed scores by (1+bridge_boost_factor) for bridged files
- [x] Doc→source bridging refactored (collect_bridge_signals + fetch_bridged_chunks)
- [x] Calibration sweep includes bridge_mode in --full grid
- [x] Hook reads calibrated bridge_mode/bridge_boost_factor from calibration.json
- [x] All 545 tests passing

Core sweeps running on bobbin and flask repos. Ruff sweep pending (will take longer).

author: bobbin/crew/strider
text:
Core sweep results (inject-only baseline, 20 samples):

Flask (7k chunks): F1=0.138 sw=0.50 dd=0.1 sl=10 b=500 bm=inject — matches round 2
Bobbin (5k chunks): F1=0.246 sw=0.00 dd=0.1 sl=40 b=300 bm=inject — UP from 0.217 in round 2
  - sw flipped 0.30→0.00 (pure keyword), sl increased 30→40

Ruff sweep still pending (will take ~30min when run).

NOTE: These are inject-only results. The --full sweep (which compares off/inject/boost/boost_inject) is too expensive to run in-session (~8× larger grid). Recommend running ruff + --full sweeps asynchronously.

Implementation complete. AC remaining: run --full sweeps comparing bridge modes, record comparison.

author: bobbin/crew/strider
text:
Round 3 core sweep results recovered and archived:

**Files found:**
- /tmp/bobbin-bridge-sweep-bobbin.json → copied to docs/calibration/round3-bobbin-core.json + .bobbin/calibration.json
- /tmp/bobbin-bridge-sweep-flask.json → copied to docs/calibration/round3-flask-core.json + /tmp/bobbin-calibrate/flask/.bobbin/calibration.json
- /tmp/bobbin-sweep-ik27qy8q/astral-sh--ruff/.bobbin/ → indexed but NO calibration.json (ruff sweep never completed)

**Test repo locations:**
- Bobbin (self): /home/braino/gt/bobbin/crew/strider (5103 chunks)
- Flask: /tmp/bobbin-calibrate/flask (7171 chunks)  
- Ruff: /tmp/bobbin-calibrate/ruff (indexed at /tmp/bobbin-sweep-ik27qy8q/astral-sh--ruff/.bobbin/)

**Round 3 core sweep results (inject-only, 3600 probes, 20 samples each):**
| Repo | Best F1 | sw | dd | sl | b | bm |
|------|---------|------|-----|------|------|--------|
| Bobbin (5k) | 0.246 | 0.00 | 0.1 | 40 | 300 | inject |
| Flask (7k) | 0.138 | 0.50 | 0.1 | 10 | 500 | inject |
| Ruff (63k) | N/A — sweep never completed | | | | | |

**Next steps:**
1. Added --bridge-sweep flag (7568c89+) — 7 configs × 20 commits = 140 probes (fast)
2. Run --bridge-sweep on bobbin and flask using calibrated core params
3. Ruff core sweep still needed before bridge sweep possible there
4. Record all comparison data in docs/calibration/

author: bobbin/crew/strider
text:
Bridge sweep results (faa51b0):

**Bobbin (5103 chunks, sw=0.00 dd=0.1 b=300 sl=40):**
| Mode | BBF | F1 | P | R |
|------|-----|-----|-----|-----|
| boost | 0.50 | 0.236 | 0.274 | 0.226 |
| boost_inject | 0.30 | 0.236 | 0.274 | 0.226 |
| inject | — | 0.235 | 0.273 | 0.226 |
| off | — | 0.233 | 0.269 | 0.226 |

**Flask (7171 chunks, sw=0.50 dd=0.1 b=500 sl=10):**
All modes identical: F1=0.138, P=0.166, R=0.141

**Conclusion:** Bridge mode has negligible impact on F1 (<0.003 spread on bobbin, zero on flask). The inject mode that shipped as default is fine. Boosting gives a tiny precision edge on bobbin but nothing actionable.

**Remaining AC:**
- [x] bridge_mode configurable via ContextConfig
- [x] Commit→source signals extracted
- [x] Score boosting implemented
- [x] Calibration sweeps bridge_mode in grid (--bridge-sweep flag)
- [x] Sweep results on bobbin + flask (docs/calibration/round3-*-bridge.json)
- [ ] Ruff sweep — needs core sweep first (ruff never completed), then bridge sweep

**Archived results:** docs/calibration/ in repo (round3-{bobbin,flask}-{core,bridge}.json)
**Test repos:** /tmp/bobbin-calibrate/{flask,ruff}, bobbin self at /home/braino/gt/bobbin/crew/strider
**Ruff index (no calibration):** /tmp/bobbin-sweep-ik27qy8q/astral-sh--ruff/.bobbin/

author: bobbin/crew/strider
text:
All AC complete. Final bridge sweep results (f131ff8):

**All three repos — bridge_mode has negligible/zero impact on F1:**

| Repo | Chunks | Best F1 | Bridge spread | Best mode |
|------|--------|---------|---------------|-----------|
| Bobbin | 5k | 0.246 | 0.233-0.236 (0.003) | boost@0.50 ≈ inject |
| Flask | 7k | 0.138 | all identical | all equal |
| Ruff | 63k | 0.246 | all identical | all equal |

**Core sweep best configs:**
| Repo | sw | dd | sl | b |
|------|------|-----|------|------|
| Bobbin | 0.00 | 0.1 | 40 | 300 |
| Flask | 0.50 | 0.1 | 10 | 500 |
| Ruff | 0.50 | 0.5 | 20 | 300 |

**Conclusion:** The inject default is fine. Bridging (inject or boost) neither helps nor hurts because bridge signals rarely surface files that weren't already in search results. This makes sense — commit-touched files are typically the same files that keyword/semantic search finds.

**Archived in repo:** docs/calibration/round3-{bobbin,flask,ruff}-{core,bridge}.json
**Test repos:** /tmp/bobbin-calibrate/{flask,ruff}, self at /home/braino/gt/bobbin/crew/strider
**Filed follow-up:** bobbin-hpart (incremental calibration output to avoid crash data loss)

author: bobbin/crew/strider
text:
Phase 2 (Edit→related) and Phase 3 (grep/Grep/Glob→search) SHIPPED (b4ddfe1, bdd0ce9). Binary installed ~/.local/bin/bobbin. Global settings matcher: Write|Edit|NotebookEdit|Bash|Grep|Glob.

REMAINING:
1. VERIFY PostToolUse dispatch on fresh session — Grep or Bash grep should inject 'Bobbin Semantic Matches' in system-reminder
2. Phase 4 (P2 refs): Edit→refs for changed symbols, Read→refs for top symbols

VERIFY STEPS:
- Fresh session (handoff)
- Run: grep -r 'some_pattern' src/
- Check system-reminder for '## Bobbin Semantic Matches'
- Check metrics: grep 'post_tool' .bobbin/metrics.jsonl | tail -5

author: bobbin/crew/strider
text: PostToolUse dispatch VERIFIED on fresh session (02bd201c). Root cause: CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR=/home/braino/.claude-accounts/current redirects global settings away from ~/.claude/settings.json. PostToolUse hook was only in ~/.claude/settings.json, NOT in the account-specific settings. Fixed: added PostToolUse and PostToolUseFailure bobbin hooks to all 3 account settings files (braino, scbrown, current). Grep→'Bobbin Semantic Matches' and Edit→'Related Files' both confirmed firing with metrics entry (source: real session ID, 576ms latency).

author: bobbin/crew/strider
text: Per docs/plans/smart-dispatch-hooks.md Phase 4: After Edit, diff old/new content, extract changed symbol names, run bobbin refs for each. After Read, parse file for top-level symbols and run refs. Always show (refs are always valuable) but limit to top 3 symbols. Depends on shipped Phases 2-3 (b4ddfe1, bdd0ce9).

author: aegis/crew/malcolm
text:
## Repo Audit Results (Post-Reindex)

**17 repos indexed** (16 code + 1 beads-issues), no "default" bucket:

| Repo | Files | Chunks | Notes |
|------|-------|--------|-------|
| aegis | 713 | 4,590 | Was 3 — fixed ✓ |
| goldblum | 1,017 | 3,959 | Was 3 — fixed ✓ |
| beads | 7,373 | 18,273 | Go CLI, mostly git commits |
| beads-issues | 6,048 | 6,048 | Dolt beads indexed ✓ |
| gastown | 5,564 | 16,380 | Go, mostly git commits |
| bobbin | 693 | 5,170 | Rust + git |
| others (11) | varies | varies | All proportional to repo size |

**4 repos in repos/ dir but not indexed**: cv, pixelsrc, reckoning, resume — no files matching include patterns (*.rs, *.ts, *.go, *.py, *.md). Not a bug.

**Root cause fixed**: Incremental indexer was hardcoding "default" as repo name. Fixed to use `RepoFilter::repo_from_path()`. Daily reindex script (`reindex.sh`) was already correct.

author: aegis/crew/malcolm
text: Status tab now shows health cards instead of raw Prometheus text. Feedback tab has clickable injection_ids. Functional fixes are complete. Remaining: pure cosmetic improvements (spacing, colors, typography). P3, deferring.
